name: Swole Simulator
author: Poki
description: Get buff in Swole Simulator! In this sports game, you have to become the strongest bodybuilder of them all. To do so, you'll have to tie heavy objects to your character as they move across the field. Don't use too many however! If your character isn't strong enough they won't be able to move. Pulling objects gains you points that you can use to go train your character. The more you train, the stronger you become and the more items you can pull. Once you're strong enough, you can unlock new areas and with it, new outfits for your bodybuilder. Will you be the strongest of all time? How to play Swole Simulator? Movement: WASD or arrow keys Pick up: E Who created Swole Simulator? Swole Simulator was created by Bun Muen. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Swole Simulator for free? You can play Swole Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Swole Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Swole Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
